title: lesquerella mendocina
intro: Lesquerella mendocina, also known as the California bladderpod, is a perennial herb belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Lesquerella mendocina can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
